situational_context: Extended low-training-load period continues: chronic load at 19 (~1.2% of 2023 historical peak of 1608). Activity pattern: e-bike commuting on sur-site days (load 9-12/ride) with occasional Zwift sessions (load 15). HRV stable-balanced at 36 ms (7d avg), within normal range of 90d baseline (35.7 ± 3.1). RHR improving at 50-52 bpm. Sleep adequate (7.33h avg) but variable (5.95-8.29h range), with one sub-6h night driven by infant cohabitant fragmentation. Training readiness trending up strongly (76 → 95 over the week), body battery recovering well. Weight trending slightly down (106.9 → 105.9). VO2max stable (run 40.9, bike 39). Pattern: life-constrained gradual rebuild — capacity for load increase confirmed by high readiness scores. First structured training plan now active.

recommendations.text: Execute today's 30-min easy run and maintain ≥3 dedicated sessions this week (Wed, Fri, Sat, Sun) — commute rides complement but don't replace structured training for rebuild
recommendations.measurable: ≥3 dedicated sessions completed by Sunday, acute load 20-22

recommendations.text: Protect sleep consistency — target ≥7h every night. Sub-6h night on Apr 19 coincided with mid-week HRV/RHR dip
recommendations.measurable: 0 nights below 6.5h in the next 7 days

recommendations.text: On sur site commute days, log bike type (ebike vs gravel) in Strava title. Gravel commute (38 km, ~2h) counts as real training stimulus — adjust next day's session down accordingly
recommendations.measurable: Strava titles specify bike type on all commute days this week

markers_to_watch.threshold: Sustaining >35 ms confirms positive recovery trajectory; drop below 33 would signal concern
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 36 — marginal above threshold. Three consecutive days below avg mid-week resolved but bears monitoring

markers_to_watch.threshold: Target gradual increase toward 30+ over next 2 weeks
markers_to_watch.reason: At 19 (1.2% of peak). Structured sessions should lift this steadily

markers_to_watch.threshold: Sustaining >80 indicates capacity for continued load progression
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently at 95 — excellent. Drop below 70 would trigger deload consideration
